name: Replay 执行与 Traffic 联动
description: 验证从 Replay 执行已保存模板后，Traffic 页面能看到对应的 replay 流量记录

steps.message: ==== 步骤 1: 清理 Replay 数据 ====

steps.code: (async () => { const base = '/_bifrost/api/replay'; const requests = await fetch(`${base}/requests?limit=200`).then((r) => r.json()); for (const request of requests.requests || []) { await fetch(`${base}/requests/${encodeURIComponent(request.id)}`, { method: 'DELETE' }); } const groups = await fetch(`${base}/groups`).then((r) => r.json()); for (const group of groups.groups || []) { await fetch(`${base}/groups/${encodeURIComponent(group.id)}`, { method: 'DELETE' }); } await fetch(`${base}/history`, { method: 'DELETE' }); return true; })()

(async () => { const response = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/requests', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ name: '${requestName}', request_type: 'http', method: 'GET', url: '${requestUrl}', headers: [], body: { type: 'none' }, is_saved: true }) }); const data = await response.json(); return data.id || ''; })()

steps.message: ==== 步骤 2: 执行模板并拿到 traffic id ====

steps.code: (async () => { for (let i = 0; i < 30; i += 1) { const response = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/history?request_id=${requestId}&limit=1').then((r) => r.json()); const history = response.history || []; if (history.length > 0 && history[0].traffic_id) { return history[0].traffic_id; } await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 500)); } return ''; })()

steps.message: 执行后拿到了 traffic id
==== 步骤 3: 在 Traffic 页面验证 replay 流量 ====
Traffic 列表已出现 replay 请求记录

steps.code: (() => { const row = document.querySelector("[data-record-id='${trafficId}']"); if (!row) return false; row.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('dblclick', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()
